extracted_entity.name: Igor Olegovich KOSTYUKOV
extracted_entity.listing_reason: Head of the Main Directorate of the General Staff of the Armed Forces of the Russian Federation (GRU). Responsible for the GRU's cyberattack unit (Unit 26165/APT28/Fancy Bear), which carried out cyberattacks against the German Bundestag (2015) and the Democratic National Committee and Hillary Clinton Presidential Campaign (2016). Also responsible for the GRU Unit 74455 (Sandworm) which conducted the destructive NotPetya cyberattack (2017) and attempted interference with the 2017 French elections.
